paneContent:
в”” 39 lines...

в—ђ I can see:
  1. I'm on the `viewfinder-redesign/tiles` canvas
  2. No connected widgets to my terminal
  3. The user has selected an image widget `image-fey0f9` with src 
  `viewfinder-redesign--tiles--2026-04-26--19-31-22.png`

  Let me load that image to see what the user is looking at. The image should be at 
  `assets/canvas/images/`.

в—Џ Check if selected image exists (shell)
  в”‚ ls assets/canvas/images/viewfinder-redesign--tiles--2026-04-26--19-31-22.png
  в”‚ 2>/dev/null && echo "EXISTS" || echo "NOT FOUND"
  в”” 3 lines...

в—Џ Read viewfinder-redesign--tiles--2026-04-26--19-31-22.png
  в”‚ assets/canvas/images/viewfinder-redesign--tiles--2026-04-26--19-31-22.png
  в”” 1 line read

в—Џ I can see your canvas and the selected image вЂ” a beautiful set of blue and white
  geometric tiles with curved/arc patterns in a 4Г—2 grid layout. Very Athos
  BulcГЈo-inspired.

  I'm ready to help. What would you like me to do?

 ~/workspace/st... [вЋ‡ 4.3.0--prompt-widget*%]
